# Aisha Adam Opaluwa — AI Researcher & Engineer

MSc Engineering & AI, Carnegie Mellon University (2024–2025).
Currently Research Assistant at CMU (DFT simulations on wolframite materials, manuscript in preparation).
Open to: ML Engineering, AI Engineering, AI Research, Scientific ML, Human-AI Interaction, AI Ethics Research.

Contact: adamaisha352@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/aeesh
LinkedIn: http://linkedin.com/in/aisha-opaluwa-7287b11b4

---

## Projects

### SciReason-Bench (2026)
Category: LLM Evaluation · Benchmark Design
A structured benchmark evaluating 4 LLMs (Gemini, Phi-3, Mistral, Llama) across 5 scientific reasoning categories: factual recall, conceptual explanation, numerical reasoning, cross-domain synthesis, and calibration. 100 questions spanning AI/ML and materials science. Scored by LLM-as-judge. Key finding: model size does not reliably predict performance at this scale.
Live: https://scireason-bench.streamlit.app
GitHub: https://github.com/aeesh/scireason-bench
Stack: Python, Gemini API, Ollama, Streamlit, Pandas, Matplotlib

### Scientific Paper QA System (2026)
Category: RAG · Retrieval Systems
End-to-end retrieval-augmented generation pipeline for querying domain-specific research papers. Features a 34-question evaluation dataset with expert-verified answers and a hybrid scorer checking numbers, acronyms, and phrases independently. Failure analysis distinguishes retrieval misses from model hallucination. Fully local via Ollama/Llama 3.2.
GitHub: https://github.com/aeesh/paper-qa-system
Stack: Python, LlamaIndex, ChromaDB, Ollama, HuggingFace, Streamlit

### arXiv Abstract Classifier (2026)
Category: NLP · Fine-tuning · Explainability
Fine-tuned DistilBERT on 28k arXiv abstracts across 11 scientific fields. Trained on PSC Bridges-2 V100 GPUs via SLURM. Token-level explainability via Captum integrated gradients. Model published to HuggingFace Hub.
GitHub: https://github.com/aeesh/abstract-classifier
Stack: PyTorch, HuggingFace, Captum, WandB, SLURM

### Monkeypox Detection + Explainability (2025)
Category: Medical Imaging · Computer Vision
Extended a published VGG16-based clinical detection model by integrating ConvNeXt with transfer learning. Multi-fold cross-validation and Grad-CAM visualisations for clinical interpretability.
Stack: PyTorch, ConvNeXt, VGG16, Grad-CAM

### Multimodal Emotion Recognition (2024)
Category: Multimodal AI · Speech & Vision
Emotion recognition for ASD support contexts fusing CNN facial expression analysis with LSTM speech emotion recognition. Empirically validates fusion design — audio-visual combination outperforms unimodal baselines.
Stack: PyTorch, CNN, LSTM, MFCC

### Chatbot Access Advantage Study — CipherBot/QCRI (2025)
Category: Human-AI Interaction · EdTech
Research study with Qatar Computing Research Institute analysing how access conditions affect student engagement with CipherBot, an AI-powered educational platform. Investigated modality effects (text vs audio), mobile access, and translation features on dialogue complexity.

### Monadic DNA (2024)
Category: Privacy-Preserving AI · Blockchain
Contributed to a genomics platform enabling AI inference on encrypted health data using FHE, MPC, and blockchain permissioning. Production software.
GitHub: https://github.com/Monadic-DNA/MonadicDNA
Stack: TypeScript, React, FHE/Zama, Nillion, WASM

### TezFin / TEZEX (2022–2024)
Category: DeFi · Full-Stack Engineering
Full-stack engineering across TezFin lending protocol and TEZEX exchange on Tezos. 200+ commits to mainnet production apps including smart contract integration.
GitHub: https://github.com/StableTechnologies/TezFin
Stack: TypeScript, React, Tezos, Beacon SDK, GraphQL

---

## Experience

Research Assistant, Carnegie Mellon University (Jan 2026 – Present)
DFT simulations on wolframite oxide materials using Quantum ESPRESSO on HPC clusters. Manuscript in preparation.

Teaching Assistant, Carnegie Mellon University (Aug 2024 – Dec 2025)
TA for Introduction to Deep Learning (Spring 2025) and Research Methods in Engineering (Fall 2025).

Software Engineer, Recherché Inc (Mar 2021 – Dec 2025)
Built privacy-preserving AI infrastructure (FHE, MPC, blockchain). Full-stack engineering across TezFin, TEZEX, and Galleon wallet. 200+ commits to mainnet production apps.

Data Analyst, Innovate for Africa (Jan 2021 – Feb 2021)
Predictive modelling for urban housing analytics.
